title: Session Explorer
description: Per-session deep-dive — select a session to see its full trace hierarchy, every LLM call, tool call, conversation flow, and cost breakdown. The killer feature for debugging AI agent behavior.

list.name: session
list.label: Session ID
list.description: Click a session in the Recent Sessions table below, or paste a session ID here.

panels.title: Recent Sessions
panels.description: Click a session row to drill down. The Session ID column is clickable — it sets the $session variable automatically.

panels.title: Active Time
panels.description: Active processing time (LLM + tool calls), excluding idle time between user messages.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_active_duration_ms [$__range]))

panels.title: Total Cost
panels.description: Session total cost in USD.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_cost_total [$__range]))

panels.title: Total Tokens
panels.description: Total tokens consumed by this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_tokens_total [$__range]))

panels.title: LLM Calls
panels.description: Number of LLM calls in this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_latency_count [$__range]))

panels.title: Tool Calls
panels.description: Total tool calls in this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_tools_total_calls [$__range]))

panels.title: Cache Hit %
panels.description: Token cache hit ratio for this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_cache_hit_ratio [$__range]))

panels.title: Session Trace Hierarchy
panels.description: Full invoke_agent → chat → execute_tool span hierarchy for this session. Requires a configured Tempo datasource — if empty, all session data is available in the panels below. Click spans to see attributes (token counts, model, cost, duration).

panels.title: LLM Call Log
panels.description: LLM input/output events for this session. Click for trace correlation.

panels.title: Token Breakdown
panels.description: Per-LLM-call token breakdown: model, input/output/cache tokens, cost, and duration — sorted by cost descending.

panels.title: Tool Call Log
panels.description: All tool call events for this session. Click for trace correlation.

panels.title: Tool Duration & Status
panels.description: Per-tool-call duration and status for this session.

panels.title: Full Conversation Narrative
panels.description: Complete conversation flow: user messages → LLM calls → tool calls → responses, in chronological order. Shows actual message content when otlp.captureContent is enabled (default). Click any line for trace correlation.

targets.expr: {service_name="openclaw"} | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | event_name=~"message\\.(received|sent)|llm\\.(input|output)|tool\\.call" | line_format "{{ if eq .event_name \"message.received\" }}[USER] {{ if .openclaw_content }}{{ .openclaw_content }}{{ else }}(message from {{ .openclaw_from }}){{ end }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"llm.input\" }}[LLM →] {{ .openclaw_model }} | history={{ .openclaw_history_length }}{{ if .gen_ai_prompt }} | {{ .gen_ai_prompt }}{{ end }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"llm.output\" }}[LLM ←] {{ .openclaw_model }} {{ .openclaw_duration_s }}s | {{ .openclaw_tokens_input }}in+{{ .openclaw_tokens_output }}out{{ if .gen_ai_completion }} | {{ .gen_ai_completion }}{{ end }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"tool.call\" }}[TOOL] {{ .gen_ai_tool_name }} {{ .tool_duration_ms }}ms{{ if .tool_error }} ERROR: {{ .tool_error }}{{ else }} | params: {{ .tool_param_keys }}{{ end }}{{ else if eq .event_name \"message.sent\" }}[ASSISTANT] {{ if .openclaw_content }}{{ .openclaw_content }}{{ else }}(sent to {{ .openclaw_to }}){{ end }}{{ else }}(event){{ end }}"

panels.title: Session Lifecycle Events
panels.description: Chronological lifecycle events for this session — session_start, llm.input, llm.output, tool.call, subagent.spawn, session_summary. Click trace IDs to open Tempo waterfall.

panels.title: Tool Execution Timeline
panels.description: All tool calls for this session with tool name, duration, params, and errors. Click trace IDs to open Tempo waterfall.

panels.title: P50 Latency
panels.description: Median LLM call latency for this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_latency_avg_ms [$__range]))

panels.title: P95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile LLM call latency for this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_latency_p95_ms [$__range]))

panels.title: Max Latency
panels.description: Maximum LLM call latency in this session.

targets.expr: max(last_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_session_id="$session" | openclaw_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_latency_max_ms [$__range]))

panels.title: Parent Navigation
panels.description: If this session is a subagent, click to navigate to its parent session. Shows 'Not a subagent' when the selected session has no parent.

panels.title: Subagent Count
panels.description: Number of subagents spawned by this session.

panels.title: Total Child Cost
panels.description: Aggregate cost of all subagent sessions spawned by this session.

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name="openclaw"} | event_name="usage.session_summary" | openclaw_summary_type="final" | openclaw_parent_session_id="$session" | openclaw_parent_session_id!="" | unwrap openclaw_cost_total [$__range]))

panels.title: Subagent Activity
panels.description: Subagent spawn/end/linked events for this session.

panels.title: Child Sessions
panels.description: Subagent sessions spawned by this session. Click a child session ID to drill down.

panels.title: Related Traces (Subagents)
panels.description: Traces from subagent sessions linked to this parent session. Click a Trace ID to open the full trace waterfall in Tempo.

panels.title: Compaction Events
panels.description: Context compaction start/end events for this session.

panels.title: Cost Threshold Alerts
panels.description: Cost threshold crossing events for this session.
